'''âf-g-z''' ('''kafagaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lage|lage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lage|lage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-g-z
|-
! Lemma
| kafagaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifagaz|thifagaz]] || [[word:jifagaz|jifagaz]] || [[word:shifagaz|shifagaz]] || [[word:kifagaz|kifagaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufagaz|thuthufagaz]] || [[word:jujufagaz|jujufagaz]] || [[word:shushufagaz|shushufagaz]] || [[word:kukufagaz|kukufagaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufagaz|thufagaz]] || [[word:jufagaz|jufagaz]] || [[word:shufagaz|shufagaz]] || [[word:kufagaz|kufagaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufagaz|thufagaz]] || [[word:jufagaz|jufagaz]] || [[word:shufagaz|shufagaz]] || [[word:kufagaz|kufagaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefagaz|thefagaz]] || [[word:jefagaz|jefagaz]] || [[word:shefagaz|shefagaz]] || [[word:kefagaz|kefagaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofagaz|thothofagaz]] || [[word:jojofagaz|jojofagaz]] || [[word:shoshofagaz|shoshofagaz]] || [[word:kokofagaz|kokofagaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofagaz|thofagaz]] || [[word:jofagaz|jofagaz]] || [[word:shofagaz|shofagaz]] || [[word:kofagaz|kofagaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofagaz|thofagaz]] || [[word:jofagaz|jofagaz]] || [[word:shofagaz|shofagaz]] || [[word:kofagaz|kofagaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfagaz|thĂŠfagaz]] || [[word:jĂŠfagaz|jĂŠfagaz]] || [[word:shĂŠfagaz|shĂŠfagaz]] || [[word:kĂŠfagaz|kĂŠfagaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafagaz|thathafagaz]] || [[word:jajafagaz|jajafagaz]] || [[word:shashafagaz|shashafagaz]] || [[word:kakafagaz|kakafagaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafagaz|thafagaz]] || [[word:jafagaz|jafagaz]] || [[word:shafagaz|shafagaz]] || [[word:kafagaz|kafagaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafagaz|thafagaz]] || [[word:jafagaz|jafagaz]] || [[word:shafagaz|shafagaz]] || [[word:kafagaz|kafagaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafagaz|shafagaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafagaz|goshafagaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafagaz|gokishafagaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafagaznĂŒ|shafagaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafagaznknĂŒ|goshafagaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagaznĂŒ|gokishafagaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafagazshĂ«|shafagazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafagaznkshĂ«|goshafagaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafagazshĂ«|gokishafagazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagazro|shafagazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagaznkro|goshafagaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagazro|gokishafagazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagazmu|shafagazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagaznkmu|goshafagaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagazmu|gokishafagazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafagazsher|shafagazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafagaznksher|goshafagaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafagazsher|gokishafagazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafagazng|shafagazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafagaznkng|goshafagaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafagazng|gokishafagazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafagazya|shafagazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafagaznkya|goshafagaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafagazya|gokishafagazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafagazyam|shafagazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafagaznkyam|goshafagaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafagazyam|gokishafagazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafagaznĂŒshĂ«|shafagaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshafagaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafagaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishafagaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagaznĂŒro|shafagaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagaznknĂŒro|goshafagaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagaznĂŒro|gokishafagaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagaznĂŒmu|shafagaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagaznknĂŒmu|goshafagaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagaznĂŒmu|gokishafagaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafagazshĂ«nĂŒ|shafagazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafagaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafagazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagazshĂ«ro|shafagazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagaznkshĂ«ro|goshafagaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagazshĂ«ro|gokishafagazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagazshĂ«mu|shafagazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagaznkshĂ«mu|goshafagaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagazshĂ«mu|gokishafagazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafagazronĂŒ|shafagazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagaznkronĂŒ|goshafagaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagazronĂŒ|gokishafagazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafagazroshĂ«|shafagazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagaznkroshĂ«|goshafagaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafagazroshĂ«|gokishafagazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagazromu|shafagazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagaznkromu|goshafagaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagazromu|gokishafagazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafagazmunĂŒ|shafagazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagaznkmunĂŒ|goshafagaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagazmunĂŒ|gokishafagazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafagazmushĂ«|shafagazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagaznkmushĂ«|goshafagaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafagazmushĂ«|gokishafagazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagazmuro|shafagazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagaznkmuro|goshafagaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagazmuro|gokishafagazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
